home.hero_subtitle: Ukrainian premium hookah accessories inspired by the aesthetics of weaponry. For those who demand the experience.
home.about_text: Tactical HB is a Ukrainian premium hookah accessories brand. We combine innovative design inspired by weaponry aesthetics with flawless material quality and craftsmanship.

products.title: Products
products.subtitle: Every piece is the result of precise engineering and premium materials.

wholesale.title: Wholesale
wholesale.subtitle: We work with shops, lounges, and distributors worldwide.
wholesale.form_message: Tell us about your business and what you're interested in
wholesale.form_success: Thank you! We'll be in touch shortly.
wholesale.why_1_text: Aviation-grade aluminium, hand-finished surfaces, zero defect rate.
wholesale.why_2_text: Military-tactical aesthetic found nowhere else in the hookah industry.
wholesale.why_3_text: Low minimums, shipping across Europe and the Middle East.

about.title: About Us
about.story_title: Born from a Passion for Hookah
about.story_text_1: Tactical HB began with a simple desire — to elevate the hookah smoking experience to a new level. Our founder, a passionate shisha enthusiast, realised that the accessories available on the market often lacked the quality and uniqueness he was looking for.
about.story_text_2: Drawing inspiration from the striking materials and colours of weaponry, he set out to design, manufacture, and rigorously test products that not only looked special but delivered an unmatched smoking experience.
about.story_text_3: We take immense pride in being a Ukrainian brand. Our products reflect the craftsmanship and dedication that our country is known for.
about.value_1_text: Every product is made in Ukraine from the highest quality materials.
about.value_2_text: Weaponry-inspired aesthetics — unique in the hookah industry worldwide.
about.value_3_text: Aviation aluminium, specialist surface treatment, zero defect rate.
about.value_4_text: 33 active wholesale clients across Europe, USA, and the Middle East.
